reviews.review_description: The Mods are very nice and the events ar also pretty fun I knew i wasn't gonna win in the recent event so thats why i let black go ahead and get 3rd place instead of me.

reviews.review_title: Even though I'm a mod this game is good
reviews.review_description: Tbh protocol cooked while making this and I recommend all of you to give this game a try especially if you wanna chill or play some horror

reviews.review_title: Genuinely the best game I’ve ever played
reviews.review_description: The game is so fun. Even when you’re alone. But I def recommend  to have your friends join for full experience
very fun game, amazing owner, amazing staff, i definitely would recommend. definitely my top 3 favorite games

developer_response.body: After looking into your account, it appears that you are banned and the in game system may have falsely flagged you. As the server backend says that you are not currently banned. Try: restarting your VR, reconnecting to your internet and uninstalling and reinstalling the game (you will not lose your cosmetics).
